title: Pull Bows Purple Decorative Ribbon Bows for Gift Wrapping Presents Box 50mm Butterfly Knot Flowers Bouquet Gift Basket Bow Birthday Wedding Valentine Crafts Bows 5 Pieces
features: 5 Pieces Pull Bow Set: Package includes 5 pieces pull bows in Purple color to Decorate presents. The size of the gift ribbon bow is 50 mm that fits most gift boxes/Baskets

Bright Decorative Colors: Pull bows have comes in various colors like Black, Blue, Brown Gold Hot Pink, Light Blue, orange, Pink etc. Choose pull bows according to different occasions which will make your gifts more attractive and adorable.

High Quality: These ribbon bows are made of high quality Satin material, non-toxic, odourless and environmentally friendly. These premium present wrapping ribbons are wear-resistant, not easy to wrinkle or fade. Durable ribbon bows can be used rapidly

Easy to Use: Just pull the core ribbon inward and slide the outer ribbon upwards to show the ideal bow shape in one second; you can also follow the steps in the picture to get a beautiful spherical flower

Applicable Occasions: These POM POM pull bows are perfect for gifts box packaging and decorating to make your gifts more attractive. You can also use it on flower bouquets, Gift box, gift baskets, wine bottles, crafts projects, wedding car, Christmas trees and so on
description: Product Description Bows & ribbons for christmas tree, gift wrapping pack These pull bows are designed beautifully so that they look shiny under light, its final shape is like a flower, pretty and ornamental, and can make your gift boxes a good decorative effect. pull bows for gift wrapping,christmas bows Wide applications: Suitable for gift box packaging, flower packaging, decoration, wedding table ornament, and Christmas decorations, you can also use them to decorate your party, wedding ceremony, or baby shower, and make your important day full of romantic and beautiful feelings. How to use Unfold bow and open ends to locate narrow pull strings. Hold pull strings together with one hand and slide plastic ring away from you with the other hand to form a bow. Tie pull strings together at base. wedding car You can decorate your wedding car with these beautiful pull bows of different colors.
